_comment: Single source of truth for constants that exist on both the JS and PHP sides. Imported via JSON in src/components/constants.js (webpack handles JSON natively) and read via motion_blocks_shared_constants() in animation-plugin.php. Adding a new shared constant: add it here, then expose it through both consumer paths.
_attributeDefaults_comment: Active defaults for animation attributes — what new blocks get from selectMode + what the PHP render filter falls back to when an attribute key is missing from the saved block-comment JSON (WordPress omits values equal to the SCHEMA default). Distinct from the SCHEMA defaults declared in src/index.js:addAnimationAttributes, which some intentionally hold at older values for block-validation back-compat (e.g. animationDelay schema=0.4 vs active=0). JS reads these via the spread in DEFAULT_ATTRIBUTES (src/components/constants.js); PHP via the motion_blocks_attr_default() helper (animation-plugin.php).
